features.name: std::randomize() with inline constraints
features.description: Code should include a std::randomize() call with a 'with' constraint block containing relational constraints on the randomized variable
features.snippet: std::randomize(cycles) with { cycles >= min; cycles <= max; }

features.name: dist constraint operator in randomize with block
features.description: Code should include a distribution constraint using 'dist' operator inside a std::randomize() 'with' constraint block, with weighted distribution across a range
